name: gambling-den
summary: A gambling hall — dice tables, a card-pit, a wheel-of-chance, a bar along one wall, a heavy door to a private high-stakes room. Smoky, loud, full of suspicion.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle, several game stations arrayed around the floor

primary_palette.note: classic den — dice and cards, small bar
casino-style — multiple card tables plus wheel

story_prompts: big game — every table packed, dealer sweating, a noble losing badly
cheat exposed — overturned table, dagger drawn, owner's muscle closing in
quiet afternoon — two regulars playing cards, owner counting the take
raid — guards at the door, patrons fleeing, owner sweeping coin into a bag

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: smoky low light (0.35) — table lamps pool light where it's needed

anti_patterns: tables leave sight-lines to the door — gamblers don't sit with backs to it
bar counter tucked to one side — this isn't a tavern, the games are the point
don't over-light — smoky dimness is the mood
